heading: Exclusive Federal jurisdiction
label: 2338 Exclusive Federal jurisdiction
text: The district courts of the United States shall have exclusive jurisdiction over an action brought under this chapter.
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to any pending case or any cause of action arising on or after 4 years before , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 29, 1992section 1003(c) of Pub. L. 102–572section 2331 of this title
